name: Joseph Lamb
abstract: Joseph Francis Lamb (December 6, 1887 – September 3, 1960) was an American composer of ragtime music. Lamb, of Irish descent, was the only non-African American of the "Big Three" composers of classical ragtime, the other two being Scott Joplin and James Scott.

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: the classical rags of James Scott and Joseph Lamb, and Scott Joplin of course, and so many others, they are all in a very strict, you could say classical form
about_quotes.doc_title: Schuller Gunther — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
